history.content: USER: command for push in git

Error:
Git error: `fatal: unable to access 'remote_repo': remote rejected errors`

Cause:
The remote repository (`remote_repo`) has rejected the push due to unresolved merge conflicts or other errors.

Fix:
1. Resolve any pending merge conflicts locally by using `git pull --rebase`, then `git push`.
2. Check for any broken links or permissions issues in your local repository and fix them before pushing again.

Commands:
```lua
git pull --rebase # Resolves merge conflicts if any
git push             # Push to the remote repository after resolving conflicts
```
